complaint_text: Hi, I received my order ORD-1887 but the item is damaged. The dress has a torn seam on the side. I'd like a replacement or refund please.

context.notes: Order ORD-1887 found for Hannah. Delivered on 2026-04-19. Issue: damaged item. Sentiment: negative.

reasoning.rationale: Item was delivered and is clearly damaged (torn seam); policy prefers refund for clearly damaged delivered items.

response.english: Dear Hannah, I am so sorry to hear that your Linen Midi Dress arrived with a torn seam. We understand how disappointing this is. We have processed a full refund of MYR 129.00 to your original payment method for order ORD-1887. You may keep or dispose of the damaged item. Please allow a few business days for the refund to reflect. Thank you for your patience.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Hannah yang dihormati, kami amat minta maaf kerana Linen Midi Dress anda tiba dengan jahitan yang koyak. Kami faham betapa mengecewakannya keadaan ini. Kami telah memproses bayaran balik penuh sebanyak MYR 129.00 ke kaedah pembayaran asal anda untuk pesanan ORD-1887. Anda boleh menyimpan atau melupuskan barang yang rosak tersebut. Harap tunggu beberapa hari bekerja untuk bayaran balik diproses. Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: High confidence refund for clearly damaged delivered item. Policy aligned, no escalation needed.

context.notes: No order ID provided and order lookup returned null. Issue is delivery_delay with negative sentiment.

reasoning.rationale: No order ID provided and order lookup failed; cannot process request without locating the order first.

response.english: Hello! I understand you are waiting for your order, and I apologize for the delay. Unfortunately, we were unable to locate your order details without an order ID. I have escalated your request to our support team, who will reach out to you shortly to help locate your order.
response.bahasa_malaysia: Helo! Saya faham anda sedang menunggu pesanan anda, dan saya memohon maaf atas kelewatan ini. Malangnya, kami tidak dapat mengesan butiran pesanan anda tanpa ID pesanan. Saya telah menyerahkan permintaan anda kepada pasukan sokongan kami, yang akan menghubungi anda sebentar lagi untuk membantu mengesan pesanan anda.

supervisor.supervisor_note: Order lookup failed with no ID provided. Escalating to human agent to locate order and address negative sentiment on delivery delay.
